arts.ttl: 3 Louie Barry alternatives Derby County should consider amid intense battle for Aston Villa star
arts.sum: Derby County are among the clubs rumoured to be eyeing Aston Villa loanee Louie Barry ahead of the… The post 3 Louie Barry alternatives Derby County should consider amid intense battle for Aston Villa star appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Crisis, desperation and why RB Leipzig must beat Aston Villa in the Champions League
arts.sum: Leipzig returned to winning ways against Frankfurt in the German Cup last Wednesday and winger Antonio Nusa claimed afterwards that there was no added pressure on him and his teammates to impress despite their lack of results across November. "I can't think of a better coach for us at the moment," he told DAZN after Leipzig's most recent Champions League defeat against Inter.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery risks reigniting Aston Villa feud in RB Leipzig match
arts.sum: Unai Emery may have to consider what happened when Aston Villa played RB Leipzig in pre-season when selecting his starting XI to face the Bundesliga side in the Champions League on Tuesday night. He lost the battle with the Belgian striker after falling into a trap which he simply didn't need to entertain in a pre-season match.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa's Christmas fixtures compared with rivals in Champions League pursuit
arts.sum: Manchester United (H), Aston Villa (A), Everton (H), Leicester City (A), West Ham (H) Crystal Palace (H), West Ham (A), Brentford (H), Aston Villa (A), Arsenal (H)

arts.ttl: Aston Villa amongst 'ambitious' suitors for €80 million Juventus winger
arts.sum: Juventus winger Kenan Yildiz has been on the radar of clubs all across the continent, including some of Villa's Premier League rivals, since breaking into the first team set up at the Old Lady. Scouts from clubs in England's top tier have recently been to watch the Turkish youngster in Juve's matches against AC Milan and Lecce, according to CaughtOffside, with Arsenal, Manchester United, and Liverpool all set to rival the Villans for any transfer.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa can cash in on January transfer fire-sale amid £422m nightmare
arts.sum: There are plenty of names you'd recognise in the Lyon squad currently if you were a Premier League fan - Ainsley Maitland-Niles is out there, as are Said Benrahma, Wilfried Zaha, Nemanja Matic and also former Villan Jordan Veretout - but also some exciting, young, talented attackers who Villa could seek out and replenish their forward line with for a suitable price. Villa were productive in the summer, but it was by no means wholesale changes; aside from the 'PSR' deals involving Lewis Dobbin and Tim Iroegbunam, and the loans of Samuel Iling-Junior and Enzo Barrenechea which means Villa haven't yet benefitted directly from their talents, they added four new faces - two of which had previously played for the club - and bid farewell to three.

arts.ttl: Guns N’ Roses at Villa Park next summer
arts.sum: Aston Villa is delighted to announce that Guns N’ Roses will play Villa Park next summer as part of their 2025 European and Middle East tour. The band will be at B6 on Monday, June 23, alongside special guests Rival Sons. Season Ticket Holders and Members will have access to venue pre-sale tickets from Thursday, December 12 at 9am ahead of the general sale beginning Friday, December 13 at 9am. Further details and the associated web link will follow on Wednesday, December 11. Hospitality members should contact the sales team as soon as possible. Guns N’ Roses join a growing list of global music stars to appear at Villa Park, alongside Bruce Springsteen, P!NK and Foo Fighters in recent years. Guns N’ Roses Register interest for ticket alerts Find Out More

arts.ttl: RB Leipzig vs Aston Villa predictions: Villans can steal valuable victory
arts.sum: Aston Villa's form has picked up over the last week and Dan Fitch suggests cautiously backing them to claim a valuable three points against a RB Leipzig side struggling in Europe.

arts.ttl: RB Leipzig vs. Aston Villa: UEFA Champions League probable teams, match stats and LIVE blog!
arts.sum: As one of three sides remaining in the UEFA Champions League with no points to show on the board, Marco Rose ’s men will look forward to bringing renewed confidence into the competition following back-to-back victories on the domestic front. Leipzig are hungry to ignite their challenge in European club football's top competition and having recently bounced back to winning ways, look well set to give their fans some festive cheer with Aston Villa in town.
